uplink.description: Onboard temperature + humidity + atmospheric pressure + battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds Elsys TLV frame. Raw decode (TEMP 0x01=234->23.4C, RH 0x02=55%, PRESSURE 0x14 raw 1013250/1000=1013.25 hPa atmospheric, VDD 0x07=3600 mV) produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; expected.data is the authored normalization (battery=mV/1000, pressure in air only when 900-1100 hPa).

uplink.description: Sub-zero temperature + humidity + light + CO2 + motion + battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds Elsys TLV frame. Raw decode (TEMP 0x01=-50->-5.0C, RH 0x02=80%, LIGHT 0x04=1200 lux, CO2 0x06=450 ppm, MOTION 0x05=4, VDD 0x07=3300 mV) produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; expected.data is the authored normalization (motion->action.motion.count with detected=count>0).

uplink.description: External IO frame: external probe temperature, analog/digital inputs, distance, accelerometer (extras only)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds Elsys TLV frame. Raw decode (EXT_TEMP1 0x0C=187->18.7C, ANALOG1 0x08=2500 mV, EXT_DIGITAL 0x0D=1, EXT_DISTANCE 0x0E=850 mm, ACC 0x03 x=2 y=-3 z=63) produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js; expected.data is the authored normalization. External probe temperature is general-purpose (not a clear water probe) -> externalTemperature extra; IO inputs -> camelCase extras.

uplink.description: TTN example frame: temperature, humidity, accelerometer, non-atmospheric pressure
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input (vendor/elsys/elt-2-codec.yaml). Raw decode (TEMP 0x01=226->22.6C, RH 0x02=41%, ACC 0x03 x=1 y=39 z=5, PRESSURE 0x14 raw 100729105/1000=100729.105) produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. The decoded pressure is far outside the atmospheric vocabulary bound (900-1100 hPa), so it is preserved as the camelCase extra pressureHpa rather than forced into air.pressure.

uplink.description: Unrecognized Elsys type byte yields an error
uplink._note: Synthetic frame whose leading type byte (0xFF) matches no Elsys data type; the decoder stops on the unknown type having recognized nothing and returns an error.
